- **Step 46:** In the Company Information Section, check the following information:

Year Established
Short Company description
The Save button
  - *Expected:* The following information should be displayed:

Year Established= 1852
Short Company description= AXA SA, through its subsidiaries, provides insurance, asset management, and banking services worldwide. The company operates through six segments: France, Europe, Asia, AXA XL, International, and Transversal & Central Holdings. It offers life and savings insurance products, such as savings and retirement, other health, and personal protection products. The company also provides property and casualty insurance products, including car, home, and personal or professional liability to individual and business clients; international insurance for large corporate clients in Europe; and marine and aviation insurance services, as well as property and casualty reinsurance products. In addition, it offers asset management services in the areas of various asset classes, including equities, bonds, hedge funds, private equity, and real estate for the group's insurance companies and their clients, and retail and institutional clients. Further, the company provides health, term life, whole life, universal life, endowment, and other investment-based products for personal/individual and commercial/ group customers. AXA SA was founded in 1852 and is headquartered in Paris, France.


The Save button should be present at the end of the section.

## Test Case ID: 259398
**Title:** Verify Commercial Worksheet Additional Authority
**Path:** Test Cases/Worksheets/259398_VerifyCommercialWorksheetAdditionalAuthority

### Steps:

  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission

- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** In the Search Name field:Enter: TMHCC Com Wkt Additional AuthSearch for the Insured by clicking the Magnify glass
  - *Expected:* Search Name is populated

  - *Expected:* No radio button is selected
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the Bureau broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)

- **Step 27:** In the Company Information Section, check the following information:

Year Established
Short Company description  
Additional Company Description ?
High Risk Industry
The Save button
  - *Expected:* Year Established= 1863
Short Company description= 
Bayer Aktiengesellschaft, together its subsidiaries, operates as a life science company worldwide. It operates through Pharmaceuticals, Consumer Health, and Crop Science segments. The Pharmaceuticals segment offers prescription products primarily for cardiology and women’s health care; specialty therapeutics in the areas of oncology, hematology, and ophthalmology; and diagnostic imaging equipment and contrast agents, as well as cell and gene therapy. The Consumer Health segment markets nonprescription over-the-counter medicines, medical products, medicated skincare products, nutritional supplements, and self-care solutions in dermatology, nutritional supplements, pain and cardiovascular risk prevention, digestive health, allergy, and cold and cough. The Crop Science segment offers chemical and biological crop protection products, improved plant traits, seeds, digital solution, and pest and weed control products, as well as customer service for agriculture. This segment also provides breeding, propagation, and production/processing of seeds, including seed dressing. The company has a collaboration agreement with MD Anderson Cancer Center to develop oncology drugs; research and license agreement with Dewpoint Therapeutics, Inc. for the development of new treatments for cardiovascular and gynecological diseases; collaboration agreement with Exscientia Ltd, Foundation Medicine Inc., and Evotec AG; research collaboration with Arvinas Inc.; strategic research partnership with University of Oxford to develop novel gynecological therapies; and Kyoto University to identify new drugs candidates for the treatment of pulmonary diseases, as well as collaboration with Bicycle Therapeutics to develop bicyclic peptides. It distributes its products through wholesalers, pharmacies and pharmacy chains, supermarkets, online and other retailers, and hospitals, as well as directly to farmers. Bayer Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1863 and is headquartered in Leverkusen, Germany.

Additional Company Description = Text field (Data should not come up with S&P data)
High Risk Industry field value should be prepopulated with No Radio button but should be editable

The Save button should be present at the end of the section.

## Test Case ID: 259399
**Title:** Verify Financial Worksheet Approval through Online and with S&P Connect 3 Major Classes
**Path:** Test Cases/Worksheets/259399_VerifyFinancialWorksheetApprovalThroughOnlineAndWithSPConnect

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** In the Search Name field:Enter: TMHCC Test Worksheet 2Search for the Insured by clicking the Magnify glass
  - *Expected:* Search Name is populated
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Private
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Private
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the Yes radio button Select AIG Europe Limited
  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:Yes radio button is selectedName drop down should come upName = AIG Europe Limited is displayedShow Reinsured Details button is displayed
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selected
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau MachSelect broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list

- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button

Year Established= 1825
Short Company description=  abrdn plc provides asset management services in the United Kingdom, Europe, North America, and Asia. The company offers investment solutions and funds; long-term savings and investment products to individual and corporate customers; and life insurance and savings products. It provides its products through institutional, wholesale, and retail distribution channels. It also makes real estate investments. The company was formerly known as Standard Life Aberdeen plc. abrdn plc was founded in 1825 and is headquartered in Edinburgh, United Kingdom.

## Test Case ID: 259455
**Title:** Check for Policy Slip Templates
**Path:** Test Cases/Documentation/259455_CheckForPolicySlipTemplates

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** Insured = Policy Slip TemplateSearch for Policy Slip Template using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Search Name field is populatedSearch Name = Policy Slip Template
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Public
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Insured Name= Policy Slip TemplateIs Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Public
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the No radio button
  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:No radio button is selected
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selectedBroker = Marsh Barcelona
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau Mach Select broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selectedBroker Contact= Marta Grau Mach
- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed
- **Step 12:** Select the following required Product Information:Class Type= Financial LinesMajor Class = Directors & Officers LiabilityMinor Class= Side A + B + CClass = Standard A + B + CPlacing Type= InsuranceSub Placing Type= Direct Primary
  - *Expected:* All mandatory Product Information is selected:Class Type= Financial LinesMajor Class = Directors & Officers LiabilityMinor Class= Side A + B + CClass = Standard A + B + CPlacing Type= InsuranceSub Placing Type= Direct Primary
- **Step 13:** Select the following required Team Information:Underwriter = Debora D´AllevaUnderwriting Assistant= Sandra SimonciniProducing Team = FL -Barcelona - Local Policies
  - *Expected:* All mandatory Team Information is selected:Underwriter = Debora D´AllevaUnderwriting Assistant= Sandra SimonciniWhen selecting the Underwriter, the Producing Team should be populated:Producing Team= FL -Barcelona - Local Policies
- **Step 14:** The Submission Details Section can be left blank
  - *Expected:* Quote Due Date field is blankSubmission Received Date= today´s dateIs SME? Tickbox is untickedNotes Tickbox is unticked
- **Step 15:** Linked Policy Details Section can be left blank
  - *Expected:* Is Master? tickbox is untickedIs Local tickbox is untickedIs Tied in tickbox is unticked
- **Step 16:** Select the following required Policy Information: Inception Date= 01/03/2023Entity= Tokio Marine EuropeLegal Branch= Spanish Branch
  - *Expected:* All mandatory Policy Information selectedExpiry Date should come up automatically with 01/03/2024Policy Period should be calculated to 366 days automaticallyEntity= Tokio Marine EuropeLegal Branch= Spanish BranchThe Bureau Indicator should not be ticked and should not be editable
- **Step 17:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Displaying Policy Reference pop up is displayed
- **Step 18:** Select the OK button if the Policy Reference pop up is displayed
  - *Expected:* Underwriting Worksheet Stage page is displayed
- **Step 19:** In the UW Worksheet Stage:Click Continue
  - *Expected:* The Underwriting Stage is displayed with:Create Multiple Quote Versions titleCreate Multi Quote buttonFirst Quote has status Open Quote

Minor Class= Side A + B + C

  - *Expected:* Initiate Contract Certainty case is displayed

  - *Expected:* In the Policy / Slip Insurance= Policy/ Legally Approved Wording - CC Check not required

- **Step 54:** Select the Close button > select the Bind Policy link
  - *Expected:* Bind Stage details are populated in the Bind Quote Screen

  - *Expected:* Finalise Policy Prompt pop up is displayed

  - *Expected:* Status is populated as Signed

  - *Expected:* Policy Docs Tab should open with the following links:GenerateWordings List

  - *Expected:* Different options should come up:Quote LetterBroker BinderPolicy slipNamed Insured
- **Step 61:** Click Named Insured
  - *Expected:* Select Options Screen comes up with the following fields:Select Format= Drop downSelect Language= Drop downSelect Template= Drop downSubmit and Cancel buttonSubmit button is greyed out

  - *Expected:* The following information is selected:Select Format= Download PDF/WordSelect Language= EnglishSelect Template= NI_KR_EN_TME_SPSubmit button should become available
- **Step 63:** Click Submit
  - *Expected:* The Named Insured Endorsement comes up:Tokio Marine HCC Special Coverages Endorsement Nr. 1 NAMED  INSURED POLICY NUMBER: It is agreed  that ITEM  1 (Insured)  of  the Schedule shall read as f ollows. ITEM 1. NAMED INSURED:(a)Name: KandR Test(b)Principal Address: Test 0000 Amsterdam, NetherlandsALL OTHER  TERMS  AND CONDITIONS  REMAIN  UNCHANGED. This Endorsementwill become effective on 1 March  2023 at 00:00  CET.Insurer:  Tokio Marine Europe, S.A. Barcelona,

**Path:** Test Cases/Reports_Validation/259901_AdditionalSanctionsCheckforDAndOReport

### Steps:

  - *Expected:* Login Successfully.

  - *Expected:* Additional Sanctions check for D&O Report page is displayed, with the following fields:Created From field= Date fieldCreated To field= date fieldReset dates buttonExport to Excel buttonResults with the following columns:Case IDStatusCreated OnResolved onInsured NameInsured DomicilePolicy ReferenceUnderwriter
- **Step 3:** Select the following:Created From= 01/01/2024 Created To= Current Date
  - *Expected:* Report should display all results with:Created on = 01/01/2024< > Current Date
- **Step 4:** Select Export to Excel
  - *Expected:* All results should be exported to Excel
- **Step 5:** Select the Status filter.

- **Step 6:** Select New and the click on Apply.
  - *Expected:* Sanction Check cases are displayed with New status.

- **Step 10:** Click on Reset Dates button.
  - *Expected:* Dates should be set to blank.All available results are shown.

Type 1 or similar
Type 2 or similar
Type 3 or similar
Type 4 or similar
Type 5 or similar
Type 6 or similar
Type 7 or similar
Other

When hovering over the tool tip, the below text should be displayed

Type 1 - excludes all state backed cyber-attacks (war and non-war)
Type 2 - excludes state backed cyber-attacks as part of war and excludes all significant impairment losses for non-war
Type 3 - as Type 2 but does not exclude significant impairment non-war losses which occur outside the impaired state
Type 4 - as Type 3 but does not exclude state backed cyber-attacks as part of war outside the warring states 
Type 5 - other clauses assessed as compliant 
Type 6 - clauses which have been granted dispensations by Lloyd’s 
Type 7 - non-compliant clauses or no clause

## Test Case ID: 260006
**Title:** Check for RI Slip Templates
**Path:** Test Cases/Documentation/260006_CheckforRISlipTemplates

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** Insured = RI Slip TestSearch for  RI Slip Test using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Search Name field is populatedSearch Name =  RI Slip Test
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Public
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Insured Name=  RI Slip TestIs Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Public
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the Yes radio button Select Name= AIG Europe Limited
  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:The Yes radio button is selectedUpon selecting the Yes radio button, the following fields come up:Name fieldShow Reinsured Details buttonName= AIG Europe Limited
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selectedBroker = Marsh Barcelona
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau Mach Select broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selectedBroker Contact= Marta Grau Mach
- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed
- **Step 12:** Select the following required Product Information:Class Type= Financial LinesMajor Class = Directors & Officers LiabilityMinor Class= Side A + B + CClass = Standard A + B + CPlacing Type= Fac RISub Placing Type= Fac RI Excess

## Test Case ID: 260084
**Title:** Check for Work Flow Reports Policy expires within 7 days
**Path:** Test Cases/Dashboards/260084_CheckWorkFlowReportsPolicyExpiresWithin7Days

ROE(%)

Profitability Table for FY 2022
FCF/Revenue(%)= -15.44
ROE(%)= -3.67
ROA(%)= -1.34
Operating Margin= -0.12
Net margin= -0.05

Above field values should be calcluated as per the below formulas 
Profitability table
FCF/Revenue = Free Cash Flow/ Total Revenue *100
ROE(%)= Net Income / Total Equity*100
ROA(%)= Net Income / Total Assets*100
Operating Margin = Operating Income / Total Revenue
Net Margin= Net Income / Total Revenue

Liquidity Table for FY 2022
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable)= -472.80
Net Debt (Debt-Cash)= -37,342.00

Above field values should be calcluated as per the below formulas 
Liquidity Table
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion Financial years = Free Cash Flow/ 12
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion YTD's
 Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion for 12 months= Free Cash Flow/ 12, 
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion for 9 months=  Free Cash Flow/ 9, 
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion for 6 months= Free Cash Flow/ 6 and
Cash Burn Rate (if unprofitable) calcualtion for 3 months=  Free Cash Flow/ 3
Net Debt (Debt-Cash)= Debt – Cash

Solvency Table for FY 2022
Equity/Total Assets= -0.36
Debt/Equity= -0.90
Above field values should be calcluated as per the below formulas 
Solvency table
Equity/Total Assets= Total Equity / Assets
Debt/Equity= Debt / Equity

## Test Case ID: 262185
**Title:** Verify Commercial Worksheet Approval through Offline and with S&P Connect
**Path:** Test Cases/Worksheets/262185_VerifyCommWorksheetApprovalThroughofflineAndWithSPConnect

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** Insured = TMHCC Worksheet Offline ApprovalSearch for TMHCC Worksheet Offline Approval using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Search Name field is populatedSearch Name = TMHCC Worksheet Offline Approval
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= CommercialNAIC Description= Crop Public/Private= Public
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Insured Name= TMHCC Worksheet Offline ApprovalIs Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= CommercialNAIC Description= CropPublic/Private= Public
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the Yes radio button Select AIG Europe Limited
  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:Yes radio button is selectedName drop down should come upName = AIG Europe Limited is displayedShow Reinsured Details button is displayed
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the Bureau broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selected
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau MachSelect broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selected
- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed
- **Step 12:** Select the following required Product Information:Class Type= Financial LinesMajor Class = Directors & Officers LiabilityMinor Class= Side A+B+CClass = Standard A+B+CPlacing Type= Fac RISub Placing Type= Fac RI Excess

- **Step 13:** The Submission Details Section can be left blank
  - *Expected:* Quote Due Date field is blankSubmission Received Date= today´s dateIs SME? Tickbox is untickedNotes Tickbox is unticked
- **Step 14:** Linked Policy Details Section can be left blank
  - *Expected:* Is Master? tickbox is untickedIs Local tickbox is untickedIs Tied in tickbox is unticked
- **Step 15:** Select the following required Team Information:Underwriter = Alessandro GaianiUnderwriting Assistant= Sandra SimonciniProducing Team = FL -Barcelona - Southern Europe
  - *Expected:* All mandatory Team Information is selected:Underwriter = Alessandro GaianiUnderwriting Assistant= Sandra SimonciniWhen selecting the Underwriter, the Producing Team should be populated:Producing Team= FL -Barcelona - Southern Europe
- **Step 16:** Select the following required Policy Information: Inception Date= 01/03/2023Entity= Tokio Marine EuropeLegal Branch= Spanish Branch
  - *Expected:* All mandatory Policy Information selectedExpiry Date should come up automatically with 01/03/2024Policy Period should be calculated to 366 days automaticallyEntity= Tokio Marine EuropeLegal Branch= Spanish BranchThe Bureau Indicator should not be ticked but should be editable
- **Step 17:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Displaying Policy Reference pop up is displayed
- **Step 18:** Select the OK button if the Policy Reference pop up is displayed
  - *Expected:* Underwriting Worksheet Stage page is displayed

## Test Case ID: 262187
**Title:** Verify Financial Worksheet Approval through Online and with S&P Connect - 1 LOB
**Path:** Test Cases/Worksheets/262187_VerifyFinancialWorksheetApprovalthroughOnlineandwithSPconnect

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:Stacey Ross
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** In the Search Name field:Enter: TMHCC Test WorksheetSearch for the Insured by clicking the Magnify glass
  - *Expected:* Search Name is populated
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= Commercial / Universal BanksPublic/Private= Public
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= Commercial / Universal BanksPublic/Private= Public
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the No radio button
  - *Expected:* No radio button is selected
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the Bureau broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selected
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau MachSelect broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selected
- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed

- **Step 27:** In the Company Information Section, check the following information:Year EstablishedShort Company descriptionAdditional Company Description ?The Save button
  - *Expected:* Year Established= 1864
Short Company description= 
Royal Bank of Canada operates as a diversified financial service company worldwide. The company’s Personal & Commercial Banking segment offers checking and savings accounts, home equity financing, personal lending, private banking, indirect lending, including auto financing, mutual funds and self-directed brokerage accounts, guaranteed investment certificates, credit cards, and payment products and solutions; and lending, leasing, deposit, investment, foreign exchange, cash management, auto dealer financing, trade products, and services to small and medium-sized commercial businesses. This segment offers financial products and services through branches, automated teller machines, and mobile sales network. Its Wealth Management segment provides a suite of advice-based solutions and strategies to high net worth and ultra-high net worth individuals, and institutional clients. The company’s Insurance segment offers life, health, home, auto, travel, wealth, annuities, and reinsurance advice and solutions; and business insurance services to individual, business, and group clients through its advice centers, RBC insurance stores, and mobile advisors; digital, mobile, and social platforms; independent brokers; and travel partners. Its Investor & Treasury Services segment provides asset servicing, custody, payments, and treasury services to financial and other investors; and fund and investment administration, shareholder, private capital, performance measurement and compliance monitoring, distribution, transaction banking, cash and liquidity management, foreign exchange, and global securities finance services. The company’s Capital Markets segment offers corporate and investment banking, as well as equity and debt origination, distribution, advisory services, sale, and trading services for corporations, institutional investors, asset managers, private equity firms, and governments. The company was founded in 1864 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

Additional company description = Text field (Field should not come up with S&P data)

The Save button should be present at the end of the section.

## Test Case ID: 262188
**Title:** Check for Work Flow Reports - Open Submissions
**Path:** Test Cases/Dashboards/262188_CheckWorkFlowReports-OpenSubmissions

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:SROSS
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** In the Search Name field:Enter: Regression Open SubmissionSearch for the Insured by clicking the Magnify glass
  - *Expected:* Search Name is populated
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Private

  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:Yes radio button is selectedName drop down should come upName = AIG Europe Limited is displayedShow Reinsured Details button is displayed
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selected
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau MachSelect broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selected
- **Step 11:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed

- **Step 14:** Linked Policy Details Section can be left blank

- **Step 19:** Click Close in the right corner
  - *Expected:* Submission Search screen is displayed

  - *Expected:* Dashboard will be displayed with the following sections:Filter Sections with following filters: Underwriter/Underwriting Assistant/Producing Team/Major Class/Insured Country/ NAIC DivisionThere should be a Search and a Save Filter buttonData Validation Section with the following items:Broker Company to be ApprovedSanctions Check Directors UnresolvedSanctions Check Insured or Reinsured UnresolvedTRI Parent CheckDQ Pro issue list Bound policies without instalments generatedPolicy Period 6 months - 18 monthsRenewal Section with the following items:Failed DEC RenewalsRenewal Work BasketWorkflow with the following items:Open SubmissionsOpen NB Submissions >90 daysOpen RNS Submissions >120 daysOpen NB SubmissionsOpen RNB SubmissionsSubmissions with Quote Due within 30 daysSubmissions in Quoted StatusPolicy Expires within 7 daysPolicy Expires within 30 daysPolicy Expires within 2 monthsPolicy Expires within 4 monthsTacit Renewal within 15 daysTacit Renewal within 30 daysPolicies Signed/Written in the last 30 daysPolicies in Bound Status

  - *Expected:* In the first column:Tickbox should be tickedClose button on the top of the page should become visible
- **Step 23:** Click Close on the top of the page
  - *Expected:* Declined Reason Screen should come up
- **Step 24:** In the Declined Reason field:Select Bad Financials of Insured
  - *Expected:* In the Declined Reason field:Bad Financials of Insured is selected
- **Step 25:** In the Declined Reason Description field:Enter "Test comments"

  - *Expected:* Click Submit

  - *Expected:* Submission Search Page is displayed.
- **Step 31:** In the Policy Reference field:Enter the Policy Reference
  - *Expected:* Policy Reference is populated
- **Step 32:** Click Search button
  - *Expected:* Results are returned
- **Step 33:** In the policy:Click Actions -> Modify
  - *Expected:* Policy is opened in the Overview Tab
- **Step 34:** Click on the Capture Quote Details Link
  - *Expected:* Policy is opened in the Underwriting Stage
- **Step 35:** In the top right corner:Click Other Actions -> Decline Submission
  - *Expected:* Decline Submission section is displayed with the following fields:Declined Reason= drop downDeclined Reason Description= Free text field
- **Step 36:** In the Decline Submission Section, select the following information:Declined Reason= Bad financials of insuredDeclined Reason Description= Test test test testClick Submit
  - *Expected:* The message: Your action has been completed comes upSubmission status has changed to Declined
- **Step 37:** Close Pega
  - *Expected:* Pega is closed
- **Step 38:** Open SBS Eclipse
  - *Expected:* SBS Eclipse opens
- **Step 39:** In the Enquiry TabEnter the policy Number with an Asterix *
  - *Expected:* Policy Number field is populated
- **Step 40:** Click the Magnifying glass to search
  - *Expected:* Search results should come up
- **Step 41:** Click the Policy Reference Link
  - *Expected:* Policy should open
- **Step 42:** Click the link in the UWref field
  - *Expected:* Policy should open
- **Step 43:** In the Lines Section, check the following information:Status
  - *Expected:* In the Lines Section, the following information should come up:Status= Decline

When hovering over the tool tip beow text should be displayed

Type 1 - excludes all state backed cyber-attacks (war and non-war)
Type 2 - excludes state backed cyber-attacks as part of war and excludes all significant impairment losses for non-war
Type 3 - as Type 2 but does not exclude significant impairment non-war losses which occur outside the impaired state
Type 4 - as Type 3 but does not exclude state backed cyber-attacks as part of war outside the warring states 
Type 5 - other clauses assessed as compliant 
Type 6 - clauses which have been granted dispensations by Lloyd’s 
Type 7 - non-compliant clauses or no clause

  - *Expected:* Login successful

  - *Expected:* Year of Account is populatedYear of Account= Unknown

  - *Expected:* Insured Name field is populatedInsured Name= Tessenderlo Group NV

  - *Expected:* Major Class field comes up with different Major Classes to select
- **Step 5:** Select the major class Directors & Officers Liability > OK button
  - *Expected:* Major Class field populated with the selected Major Class
- **Step 6:** In the Submission Search screen, in the Programme View field:Select Single LOB
  - *Expected:* Single LOB is populated
- **Step 7:** Select the Search button
  - *Expected:* Search results are returned
- **Step 8:** Check the Search results are grouped by Single LOB ID for the results returned (check first results page)
  - *Expected:* Search results are grouped by Single LOB IDSearch results should show the Single LOB ID column and Multi LOB ID columnMulti LOB ID should have format MYYNNNNNSingle LOB ID should have format SLLYYNNNNNPer Single LOB ID, Search results should have the same: - Insured Name - Major Class - Year of AccountFor YOA= 2022:The Submission with Major Class= D&O and Minor Class= POSI should have a different Single LOB ID than the Submission with Major Class= D&O and Minor Class <> POSI

## Test Case ID: 262218
**Title:** Create Additional Premium Endorsement For Zero PremiumPolicy - TRI
**Path:** Test Cases/Endorsements/262218_CreateAdditionalPremiumEndorsementForZeroPremiumPolicyTRI

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with valid credentials for TRI User:EBELLO

- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission

- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** Insured = Project TRI EndorsementSearch for Project TRI Endorsement using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)

- **Step 8:** Select country = United States of America
  - *Expected:* Country is selected country = United States of America

## Test Case ID: 262222
**Title:** Create New Surplus Lines Broker Contact
**Path:** Test Cases/PartyManagement/262222_CreateNewSurplusBrokerContact

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EBELLO
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** In the Pega Menu:Click on Party Management link
  - *Expected:* The following options are displayed:Insured BrokerBroker ContactSurplus Lines BrokerSurplus Lines Broker Contact
- **Step 3:** Click on Surplus Lines Broker Contact link
  - *Expected:* Surplus Lines Broker Contact Search page is displayed with below fields: Search TermsSearch Broker Contact FieldMagnifying Glass
- **Step 4:** Enter "Does not exist" in Search Broker Contact fieldSelect the Magnifying Glass
  - *Expected:* Surplus Lines Broker Contact Search Results are returned with the following columns:Surplus Broker Contact ResultsNameJob PositionTelephoneEmailAddressCityCountryBroker CompanyStatusNotesSocial Media ContactLicence Number'No items' text is returned within the search results Create New button is shown
- **Step 5:** Select the Create New  button
  - *Expected:* Surplus Lines Broker Contact Details section is displayed with the below information:Message: To save the information, please click "Save/Submit" before leaving this page.Surplus Lines Broker Contact First Name*Surplus Lines Broker Contact Surname*Surplus Lines Broker contact email*Job PositionMobileSurplus Lines Broker Contact TelephoneSurplus Lines Broker*CityCountryAddressSocial Media ContactNotesSurplus Lines Broker Contact Fax Table with below colomns: - License State- State License Number- SLANumber- Transacode- Active- Date Updated  + Add Item x DeleteCancel ButtonCreate Button
- **Step 6:** Complete the following fields: Surplus Lines Broker Contact First Name*= Does notSurplus Lines Broker Contact Surname*= ExistSurplus Lines Broker contact email*= doesnotexist@tmhcc.comSurplus Lines Broker*= Aon Risk Services Northeast, Inc.
  - *Expected:* The following details are populated:Surplus Lines Broker Contact First Name*= Does notSurplus Lines Broker Contact Surname*= ExistSurplus Lines Broker contact email*= doesnotexist@tmhcc.comUpon selecting:Surplus Lines Broker*= Aon Risk Services Northeast, Inc., the following information should be defaulted:City= New YorkCountry= United States of AmericaAddress= One Liberty Plaza
- **Step 7:** Select the Add Item link
  - *Expected:* A new row is added with the following editable fields:Licence stateState licence numberActive field
- **Step 8:** In the Licence State drop down, select:Licence State= New York
  - *Expected:* The following information is shown:Licence State= New YorkThe active tickbox should be tickedThe Date Updated field should default to Today´s Date
- **Step 9:** In the State Licence Number field, enter:State Licence Number= 1234567
  - *Expected:* The following information is shown:State Licence Number= 1234567
- **Step 10:** Select the Create button
  - *Expected:* The following confirmation message is displayed 'Does Not Exist" created successfully'
- **Step 11:** In the Search Broker Contact field, enter:Does Not ExistSelect Search
  - *Expected:* Surplus Lines Broker Contact Results are returned with the following columns:Name= Does Not ExistJob Position= BlankTelephone= BlankEmail= doesnotexist@tmhcc.comAddress= One Liberty PlazaCity= New YorkCountry= United States of AmericaBroker Company= Aon Risk Services Northeast, Inc.Status= BlankNotes= BlankSocial Media Contact= BlankLicence Number= 1234567

## Test Case ID: 262225
**Title:** Create New bureau Proportional Treaty with Major class D&O 4141
**Path:** Test Cases/NewBusiness/262225_CreateNewBureauProportionalTreaty

  - *Expected:* Coverholder radio button is selected

Various Insureds field comes up

Coverholder= HCC Specialty Underwriters Inc.

Various Insureds= Various Insureds - UK

## Test Case ID: 423138
**Title:** Create a D&O Policy with inception date in year: 20YY - RI Code DAMP
**Path:** Test Cases/RICode/423138_CreateDOPolicyInceptionDateYear20YYRICodeDAMP

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
- **Step 2:** Select Create > Start Financial Lines Submission
  - *Expected:* Insured Details page is displayed
- **Step 3:** Select the Insured radio button
  - *Expected:* Insured radio button is selected
- **Step 4:** Insured = HCCG D&O DAMPSearch for HCCG D&O using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Search Name field is populatedSearch Name = HCCG D&O DAMP
- **Step 5:** In the Create New Insured, enter the following details:Is Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= FundsPublic/Private= Public
  - *Expected:* In the Create New Insured, the following details are populated:Insured Name= HCCG D&O DAMPIs Parent Tickbox tickedAddress line 1= TestPost Code= 0000City= BarcelonaCountry= SpainNAIC Division= FinancialNAIC Description= Public/Private= Public
- **Step 6:** In the Reinsured Information Section:Select the No radio button
  - *Expected:* In the Reinsured Information section, the following details are populated:No radio button is selected
- **Step 7:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* Broker & Other Parties page is displayed
- **Step 8:** Select country = Spain
  - *Expected:* Country is selected
- **Step 9:** Broker = Marsh BarcelonaSearch for and select the broker returned above using the first few characters (3 characters minimum)
  - *Expected:* Broker is selectedBroker = Marsh Barcelona
- **Step 10:** Broker Contact= Marta Grau MachSelect broker contact returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Broker contact is selectedBroker Contact= Marta Grau Mach
- **Step 11:** Business Provider= Tokio Marine DAMPSelect business provider returned above from the Name dropdown list
  - *Expected:* Business Provider is selectedBusiness Provider= Tokio Marine DAMP
- **Step 12:** Select the Continue button
  - *Expected:* General Data page is displayed

## Test Case ID: 423153
**Title:** Create New Non Bureau K&R Submission with Maritime Piracy
**Path:** Test Cases/RICode/423153_CreateNewNonBureauKRSubmissionMaritimePiracy

### Steps:
- **Step 1:** Login to Pega with UWA credentials:EMUELLER
  - *Expected:* Login successful
